titles.title: Meitantei Conan Movie 28: Sekigan no Flashback
名探偵コナン 隻眼の残像

data.title: Meitantei Conan Movie 28: Sekigan no Flashback
data.title_japanese: 名探偵コナン 隻眼の残像
data.synopsis:
The twenty-eighth Meitantei Conan movie.

An old friend of Mouri Kogoro reopens an investigation of the incident that caused the scars on Inspector Yamato's face. This time not only Nagano's police involved, but Tokyo MPD, CSICE and PSB are involved not forgetting of course Edogawa Conan, the detective boys and the sleeping detective, in a plot full of assassination attempts.

In the cold winter of Nagano, Conan has the job of finding the truth behind the incident 10 months ago, that lead to Yamato's face injury, as well as the murder and murders attempts that followed. For that he will count with the precious help of the Nagano police team, Mouri's shooting skills and the PSB knowledge.

data.title: Kidou Senshi Gundam: GQuuuuuuX
data.synopsis:
In the year Universal Century 0079, the Earth Federation and Principality of Zeon battled on opposite sides of the deadly One Year War. During one skirmish, infamous Zeon pilot Char Aznable successfully infiltrated an enemy base and stole a prototype mobile suit called the Gundam. With this powerful weapon, Char helped his allies achieve a decisive victory. However, in a freak accident involving the Gundam's advanced technology, Char vanishes alongside his signature red mobile suit.

Six years later, pockets of war continue to rage on. Teenager Amate "Machu" Yuzuriha lives on a quiet space colony with her mother. Though her classmates attend taxing cram schools, Machu yearns for a more exciting life. Her wishes are answered through the crash landing of the Gundam QuuuuuuX, a state-of-the-art mobile suit used by a squad of Zeon soldiers. Machu discovers a natural affinity with the suit, and she uses it to fend off Federation forces. She is aided in her efforts by the mysterious Shuuji Itou, who pilots a Gundam that bears a remarkable resemblance to the one once used by the missing Char.

Unbeknownst to Machu, her brawl is witnessed by a group of mecha enthusiasts who use mobile suits to fight in duos for competitive sport. In the pursuit of a thrilling life and human connection, Machu partners with Shuuji and engages in a series of escalating clan battles as hints of a greater conflict loom above her.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Jungle Taxi
data.synopsis:
The taxi driver picks up an unwelcome fare in the jungle. He does as he's told and takes his customer to fetch the man close to death on the beach. Arrived at the destination, the cabbie reaches inside his jacket for a gun.

(Source: YouTube)

titles.title: Hell Mode: Yarikomizuki no Gamer wa Hai Settei no Isekai de Musou suru
ヘルモード ～やり込み好きのゲーマーは廃設定の異世界で無双する～
Hell Mode: The Hardcore Gamer Dominates in Another World with Garbage Balancing

data.title: Hell Mode: Yarikomizuki no Gamer wa Hai Settei no Isekai de Musou suru
data.title_english: Hell Mode: The Hardcore Gamer Dominates in Another World with Garbage Balancing
data.title_japanese: ヘルモード ～やり込み好きのゲーマーは廃設定の異世界で無双する～
data.synopsis:
Kenichi Yamada has spent most of his adult life chasing the next punishing challenge in online gaming, only to find the modern landscape dominated by forgiving mechanics. As if fate were listening to his desire, Kenichi receives a sudden, mysterious invitation to an untitled game promising an inconceivable level of difficulty. Delighted, he selects its most ruthless setting without hesitation—Hell Mode.

However, instead of diving into another virtual game, Kenichi is reborn in another world as a peasant named Allen, forced to grapple with a cruelly complex system where even the basics of progression demand relentless effort. Consequently, Allen must build his strength from the ground up and learn to master the summoner class. With his resilience being tested at every turn, Allen embarks on an uncharted journey that might just prove to burn hotter than actual hell.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Desk Bugs
data.synopsis:
A bright red desk and a blue pencil. Skulls, cups, and a modular synthesizer. When you sit at the desk, they appear. With fluffy purple bodies, they're called "Desk Bugs."

(Source: Fantasia Film Festival)

data.title: Nikuen
data.synopsis: Rumors spread around the school about a new app that hypnotizes people. Meanwhile, busty high school student Aoi Era finally finds a boyfriend, and they go to visit her. In the hallway, they are met by her mother Yuko, who only looks out into the hallway, but does not come out. The girl has little interest in this situation. But it should be.

titles.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Santa-san wo Sukue! Koori no Shiro no Christmas
それいけ! アンパンマン サンタさんをすくえ! 氷の城のクリスマス

data.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Santa-san wo Sukue! Koori no Shiro no Christmas
data.title_japanese: それいけ! アンパンマン サンタさんをすくえ! 氷の城のクリスマス
data.synopsis:
Today is Christmas Eve. The town is very lively as people prepare for the Christmas party! Everyone is looking forward to Santa's arrival. However, Baikinman doesn't seem to like the fact that everyone is having fun... Santa is busy preparing presents in Christmas Valley. But then Baikinman shows up and attacks Santa! Santa gets on Rudolph and escapes. Then the Snow Wolf appears...?

(Source: Amazon, translated)

titles.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Tetsu no Hoshi no Iron Christmas
それいけ！アンパンマン てつの星のアイアンクリスマス

data.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman: Tetsu no Hoshi no Iron Christmas
data.title_japanese: それいけ！アンパンマン てつの星のアイアンクリスマス
data.synopsis:
Today is the long-awaited Christmas Eve! An Iron Christmas party is being held on Iron Planet. Kokin-chan is having a blast since it's her first time on Iron Planet. She makes friends with Kotetsu-chan and they play together at the Iron amusement park. But then the Iron's precious Christmas tree gets transformed into Baikinman's robot! Everyone is turned into a tree, and they're in big trouble. They all have to protect their precious Christmas before Santa arrives!

(Source: Amazon, translated)
